title: Portland, Oregon
html:
Portland, Oregon

Yahir's HS-era out-of-town launchpad — the city where the YEBW program ran (Ondine Hall = PSU dorm), where Alexandria lived, and the destination for Yahir's first independent-travel arc as a teenager (Phoenix→Portland flight, 2019 09 10 low key writing this to end). Sits between Grants Pass (childhood) and Corvallis (college) on the Oregon geography.

Chronology

  • 2019-07-14 — 2019 07 14 ondine hall — Ondine Hall (PSU dorm) reference, YEBW program prep
  • 2019-08-11 — 2019 08 11 finish packing shit in morning — packing for YEBW in Portland
  • 2019-09-10 — 2019 09 10 low key writing this to end — canonical mention — the Phoenix→Portland flight, Alexandria base
  • 2021-10-25 — 2021 10 25 places for a date — Portland on a date-locations list (OSU-era)
  • 2025-05-19 — 2025 05 19 screenshot 2025 05 19 at 9 56 14 pm 51f03137 — most recent appearance

Why it matters

Portland is the proof-of-concept city for Yahir's leave-Grants-Pass instinct. The HS-era YEBW trip + the Alexandria visit + the date-options list together establish Portland as the first "city Yahir could plausibly live in" — before Corvallis (forced by OSU), before Shanghai, before Austin. Without explicit weight in any single doc, Portland recurs as the default escape destination of teen-Yahir's geographic imagination.

Connections
